sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53468" key="karpw/simos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καρπ-ώσιμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n53468.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">yielding fruit, profitable</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1421.tlg001:81" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hermipp.Hist.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">81</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
